ksa_text: Skill in fine-tuning pre-trained language models for domain-specific tasks, including dataset preparation, training configuration, and evaluation design.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in developing and applying security system access controls.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of automated security control testing tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-010 (AI, Skill) maps to Citizen Data Scientist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5497 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.550, nist_ai_rmf=0.549, dcwf=0.422. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA AI-S-010 with composite 0.5497 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5497 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the AI domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. AI domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5497 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-S-010 (composite 0.5497) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5497 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Citizen Data Scientist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.5497 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5497, domain AI. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
